Class FileTableOwnerTBL

java.lang.Object
com.jamii.jDrive.model.FileTableOwnerTBL
@Entity public class FileTableOwnerTBL extends Object
JPA Entity representing file ownership records in the database.

This class maps to the file_table_owner table and stores information about files owned by users, including file metadata, location, size, and lifecycle status.

Key fields:

  • id - Primary key
  • userloginid - User who owns this file
  • systemfilename - System-generated filename
  • originalfilename - Original filename uploaded by user
  • filetype - Type/mime type of the file
  • filesize - Size of the file in bytes
  • status - Lifecycle status (store, in trash, deleted)
